title: Fei Ren Zai: Xian Shi Wan Jia
titleRomaji: Fei Ren Zai: Xian Shi Wan Jia
synopsis: Jiuyue, an ordinary working fox, and his fellow gods Ao Lie , Nezha , Xiaotian , and Xiaoyu , accidentally stumble into a game world full of traps. Jiuyue, who loves playing games, actively participates in the adventure, hoping to prove himself by leading his friends who are not good at games to pass the levels. However, this plan suddenly changes due to the appearance of two top game bosses. At the same time, the seemingly happy game world is quietly brewing a dramatic change that threatens all players. The little weakling seriously ignites his fighting spirit and tries to weave his destiny with courage! If nothing unexpected happens, something unexpected should happen...

title: Yi Shou Mi Cheng
synopsis: The world is an illusion, but love is real. At eighteen, Gao Yang accidentally discovers the cruel truth of the world: his family and friends are all terrifying "beasts," and these "beasts" will kill anyone who discovers the truth. Facing the "beasts'" frenzied attacks, Gao Yang, on the verge of death, activates a mysterious system and awakens his talent Luck, thus beginning a game of survival between lamb and wolf… (Source: iQIYI, translated)

title: Kero Kero Keroppi no Kyouryuu ga Deta
titleRomaji: Kero Kero Keroppi no Kyouryuu ga Deta
titleNative: けろけろけろっぴの恐竜がでた
synopsis: While playing hide and seek, Keroppi and the gang find some dinosaur bones. With the village elder they dig out more and put the bones back together and find out it was a baby dinosaur. In the nearby museum there is a mama dinosaur on display and as night falls the baby dinosaur's skeleton comes to life in search of its mother. The gang tries to help it reunite it and the cries of the baby dinosaur skeleton animate the mama's skeleton. Once together again their souls ascend to heaven and both skeletons become displayed lovingly at the museum.

tags.name: Animals

title: Jiangtun: Feng Shi Wu
synopsis: Since ancient times, the magical inhabitants of the seas have been under the protection of fairies who use the mystical Dance of the Wind to scare away evil. Over the years, magic began to fade, and magical creatures began to disappear. Now, the last of its kind in China can only be saved by a young fairy named Lin, who must find someone to share the Wind Dance with and hide a unique creature from poachers.

title: Poo Down Hill Up
synopsis: Bird poo fell in love with the hill but the hill is taken away high above the clouds. Poo is devastated. But then, a triangular telescope falls from the sky and it’s showing what the hill is seeing. Graduate Work 2022, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)
